audit_result.proof_trace: Config::validate() only checks config_name, never validates fork epoch ordering. Config::phase_at_epoch() (L920-926) relies on take_while over ordered epochs; misordered epochs cause wrong phase detection. Custom YAML configs can supply any epoch values unchecked.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Operator loads malicious config YAML with misordered epochs (e.g., electra_fork_epoch < deneb_fork_epoch). Node accepts config after validate(). phase_at_epoch() returns wrong phases, causing phase-specific consensus rules to be misapplied or skipped.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-014.text: Fork epoch constants must be strictly ordered: GENESIS < ALTAIR < ... < ELECTRA < FULU.
